# 17 — Legal / Consent / Privacy

<context-hint>
Use to build legal/compliance foundations without pretending full legal review is done.
</context-hint>

<task>
Act as Security + Backend + Admin UI Agent. Implement legal/consent/privacy foundations.
</task>

<instructions>
1. Read `docs/spec/index.md`, `docs/spec/compact/07_security_privacy.md`, `docs/spec/compact/04_admin_rbac.md`, and `docs/spec/compact/10_testing_acceptance.md`.
2. Inspect legal/consent/privacy models/routes/UI.
3. Implement policy versions, user consent, cookie consent basics.
4. Add admin visibility.
5. Add tests for consent recording.
6. Do not claim legal compliance is complete without human legal review.
</instructions>
